name: GH_PageSettings
summary: (No description provided in vendor docs for Grasshopper.GUI.Theme.GH_PageSettings.)

properties.name: DrawGrid
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether the grid ought to be drawn.

properties.name: DrawPage
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether the page ought to be drawn.

properties.name: DrawShadow
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether the page shadow ought to be drawn. If the page is not drawn, neither is the page shadow, irregardless of this property.

properties.name: EdgeColour
properties.summary: Gets or sets the page edge colour to be used.

properties.name: FillColour
properties.summary: Gets or sets the page fill colour to be used.

properties.name: GridColour
properties.summary: Gets or sets the page grid colour to be used.

properties.name: GridHeight
properties.summary: Gets or sets the height of a page grid cell.

properties.name: GridPattern
properties.summary: Gets or sets the dash pattern to apply to grid lines. Leave null or empty for a solid line.

properties.name: GridWidth
properties.summary: Gets or sets the width of a page grid cell.

properties.name: ShadowColour
properties.summary: Gets or set the page shadow colour to be used.

properties.name: ShadowSize
properties.summary: Gets or sets the size of the page shadow.
